task_completion.description: Locate and open the specified high-priority complaint case in ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase interface shows the case 'Internal Data Handling Violation - Case #8821' opened or selected.

task_completion.description: Open the event scheduling interface within the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Event', 'Add Event', or similar scheduling modal/page is open within the context of the ArkCase application.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct event title and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title field contains exactly 'Oversight Review Board' and the Description field contains 'Mandatory review of initial evidence bundle.'

task_completion.description: Set the correct start time and duration for the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event start time is set to 10:00 AM (or 10:00:00) and the end time is set to 11:00 AM, or the duration is explicitly set to 1 hour.

task_completion.description: Successfully save and create the scheduled event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event 'Oversight Review Board' is visible in the case's event list or calendar, or a success notification confirms the event creation.

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase web interface to schedule the meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the ArkCase GUI in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent read the meeting details from the specified file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window or text editor shows the agent viewing the contents of '~/meeting_details.txt'.

integrity.description: The event was genuinely created in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final event details are displayed within the standard ArkCase application interface, not typed into a separate document or mocked via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target case is 'Internal Data Handling Violation - Case #8821'. The event must be titled 'Oversight Review Board' with the description 'Mandatory review of initial evidence bundle.' The start time must be 10:00 AM (10:00:00) with a duration of 1 hour (ending at 11:00 AM).
